ocr_findings.description: ITIL book cover image replaced by alt-text placeholder 'ITIL Foundation ITIL 4 Edition + AXELOS'. The alt-text preserves the key title information present in the image.

reviewer_notes: Page 273 covers ITサービスマネジメント, サービスレベル, and ITIL definitions. All key terms and their definitions captured accurately. The cleaned re-OCR produces high-fidelity text. Sidebar chapter label (第8章) visible in image is not in OCR but this is marginal annotation, not body content.
